_note: MODE expression layer. Maps semantic palette tokens to color scale references (see color-scale.json). This is the brand's responsibility — reassign these references to apply your visual language without touching the intent layer (mode-tokens.json). Use dot notation to reference scale entries: "slate.12", "violet.9". Top-level entries like "white" are referenced by name. Changes take effect on next request — no rebuild required.

light._description: Neutral canvas. Chrome, top-of-funnel, low-emphasis sections.

neutral._description: Mild separation. Supporting context, informational sections.

dark._description: High emphasis. Spotlights whatever the preset assigns it to.

accent._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.
